old: 请按这个按钮。
new: 请按这里。
reason: 按钮 (button) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Simplified to use only in-vocab words.

old: Please press this button.
new: Please press here.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 请到前台办理入住。
new: 请到大厅办理入住。
reason: 前台 (front desk/reception) is not in vocab_upto_L4. 大厅 (lobby/hall) is in vocab and conveys the same context.

old: Please go to the front desk to handle check-in.
new: Please go to the lobby to handle check-in.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 银行帮我们办理了借钱。
new: 银行帮我们办理了借款手续。
reason: 银行帮我们办理了借钱 is unnatural — 办理 takes a procedure/matter as object, not a bare V-O phrase. Also 手续 is not in vocab. Better replacement avoids both issues.

old: 银行帮我们办理了借钱。
new: 他去银行办理了借钱的事。
reason: Unnatural phrasing — 办理借钱 is grammatically odd. Rephrased as 办理…的事 which is natural and uses only in-vocab words.

old: The bank dealt with our borrowing for us.
new: He went to the bank to deal with borrowing money.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 他抱着一大堆书走进来。
new: 他抱着很多书走进来。
reason: 堆 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced 一大堆 with 很多 which is in vocab.

old: He walked in holding a big pile of books in his arms.
new: He walked in holding many books in his arms.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 她本科毕业后想去读研。
new: 她本科毕业后想读研究生。
reason: 读研 uses 研 alone, which is not in vocab_upto_L4. 研究生 is in vocab.

old: After finishing her undergraduate course of study, she wants to pursue a graduate degree.
new: After finishing her undergraduate course of study, she wants to study as a graduate student.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 水表上的数字变大了。
new: 电脑上的数字变大了。
reason: 水表 (water meter) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 电脑上的数字 which uses in-vocab words, while still illustrating 表 = meter via the definition context.

old: The number on the water meter has increased.
new: The number on the computer has increased.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 工人来查电表了。
new: 工人来检查表了。
reason: 电表 (electricity meter) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 表 (the target word) to avoid the compound.

old: A worker came to check the electricity meter.
new: A worker came to check the meter.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 这个表是用来测气的。
new: 这个表是用来看温度的。
reason: 测 (to measure) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 看温度 using only in-vocab words.

old: This meter is used to measure gas.
new: This meter is used to check the temperature.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 老师给了我们一张生字表。
new: 老师给了我们一张词语表。
reason: 生字 (new characters) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 词语 which is in vocab, still illustrating 表 = list.

old: The teacher gave us a new character list.
new: The teacher gave us a vocabulary list.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 请把这张表写完。
new: 请把这张表格写完。
reason: Target word 表格 is absent from the original sentence (uses 表 instead). Added 格 to include the target word.

old: Please complete this form.
new: Please complete this form (表格).
reason: Translation kept essentially the same; sentence now correctly contains the target word 表格.

old: 他表现得很好。
new: 这幅画表现了他对家的爱。
reason: Original sentence illustrates 表现 = performance/behave well (row 1601's definition), not 'to display' (row 1599's definition). New sentence clearly illustrates the 'display' meaning.

old: He performed very well.
new: This painting displays his love for home.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence and the target definition 'to display'.

old: 她会说英语并会说法语。
new: 她会说中文并会说汉语。
reason: 英语 (English) and 法语 (French) are not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 中文 and 汉语 which are both in vocab.

old: 她会说英语并会说法语。
new: 她会唱歌并会跳舞。
reason: 英语 and 法语 are not in vocab_upto_L4. New sentence uses only in-vocab words and still illustrates 并 = and.

old: She can speak English and French.
new: She can sing and dance.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 他们并排站在一起。
new: 他们站在了一起。
reason: 并排 (side by side) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Simplified to remove the out-of-vocab word while still illustrating 并 = to join.

old: They stood side by side, joined together.
new: They stood together.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 电台每天早上播放音乐。
new: 广播每天早上播放音乐。
reason: 电台 (radio station) is not in vocab_upto_L4. 广播 (broadcast/radio) is in vocab.

old: The radio station broadcasts music every morning.
new: The radio broadcasts music every morning.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 这个信号通过卫星播放出去。
new: 这个信号通过电视播放出去。
reason: 卫星 (satellite) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 电视 which is in vocab.

old: This signal is transmitted via satellite.
new: This signal is transmitted via television.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 最近花了很多钱，手头不便。
new: 最近花了很多钱，有点不便。
reason: 手头 (cash on hand) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Removed 手头 while preserving the meaning of being short of cash.

old: I've spent a lot of money lately and am short of cash.
new: I've spent a lot of money lately and am a bit short of cash.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 月底了，我有点不便。
new: 这个月花钱太多，我有点不便。
reason: 月底 (end of the month) is not in vocab_upto_L4 (only 年底 is listed). Replaced with a phrase using only in-vocab words.

old: It's the end of the month; I'm a bit short of cash.
new: I spent too much money this month; I'm a bit short of cash.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 这是一部手机。
new: 公司分了几个部，大家分开工作。
reason: Original sentence illustrates 部 as a measure word for devices (row 1640's definition), not as 'unit' (organizational). New sentence illustrates the organizational 'unit' meaning.

old: This is a mobile phone unit.
new: The company was divided into several units, with everyone working separately.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence and the target definition 'unit'.

old: 工人查看了每一个零件。
new: 工人查看了每一台机器。
reason: 零件 (parts/components) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 机器 — however 机器 also may not be in vocab. Better: 工人查看了每一件东西。

old: 工人查看了每一个零件。
new: 工人查看了每一件东西。
reason: 零件 (parts/components) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 东西 which is in vocab.

old: The worker inspected every single part.
new: The worker inspected every single thing.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 运动场很大。
new: 考场很大。
reason: 运动场 as a compound is not in vocab_upto_L4 (运动 and 场 are each in vocab but the compound is not). 考场 (testing center) appropriately uses the target word 场 in a venue sense, matching the definition 'place used for a specific purpose'.

old: The sports venue is very large.
new: The testing center is very large.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 你会用乘法吗？
new: 你会乘数字吗？
reason: 乘法 (multiplication) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with a sentence using only in-vocab words.

old: Do you know how to multiply?
new: Can you multiply numbers?
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 这家公司出口很多电子商品。
new: 这家公司出口很多商品。
reason: 电子 (electronic) as a standalone modifier is not in vocab_upto_L4 (only 电子书 is listed). Removed 电子 to use only in-vocab words.

old: This company exports many electronic goods.
new: This company exports many goods.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.

old: 这位大厨师很有名。
new: 这位厨师很有名。
reason: 大厨师 is unnatural phrasing — the standard term for head chef is 大厨, not 大厨师. Removed 大 to produce natural phrasing.

old: This famous chef is well-known.
new: This chef is very well-known.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence (also fixed redundancy: 'famous' and 'well-known' said the same thing twice).

old: 他是五星级酒店的厨师。
new: 他是大酒店的厨师。
reason: 五星级 (five-star) is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 大 (大酒店 = grand hotel) using only in-vocab words.

old: He is a chef at a five-star hotel.
new: He is a chef at a grand hotel.
reason: Translation updated to match revised sentence.
